title: pilosocereus catingicola subsp. robustus
intro: Pilosocereus catingicola subsp. robustus is a subspecies of cacti plant, specifically a type of columnar cactus native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosocereus catingicola subsp. robustus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and infusing the stems, leaves, or flowers in hot water to create teas or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
